Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's pretty crowded today. I have to[n]work more efficiently than usual...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}To quickly make room for more customers,[n]I carried off a lot of dishes all at once...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Despite being busy, I responded to complaints[n]about the slow service with sincerity...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I mustered up my courage and helped[n]arguing customers resolve their issues...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The customers are ordering a lot today.[n]The café is filled with pheromones...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I offered my support to a coworker who[n]got scolded for messing up an order...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A customer's baby was bawling, but I[n]managed to soothe them gracefully...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 10}Thanks for sticking it out today. I've decided to increase your hourly wage. Keep it up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I'm getting the hang of things,[n]they're giving me a slight raise...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 10}Your handling of customers is truly wonderful. I've increased your hourly wage. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I've gotten better at my work,[n]they're giving me a slight raise...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 10}I gave you a little bonus on top of your usual pay. Thanks for helping out during peak time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After dealing with difficult customers,[n]I feel like my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} and[n]{f 4 30 2 1 1 0} have increased...![n]{f 1 1}
